known_cutoff_publicity_caveats: OpenAI reports a February 16, 2026 knowledge cutoff.
OpenAI's model page lists gpt-5.6-sol in its Snapshots section but exposes no separate dated snapshot; this registry freezes the tier-specific callable ID and does not use the gpt-5.6 alias.
Prompts with more than 272K input tokens are billed at 2x input and 1.5x output; the scalar registry prices record the standard short-context rates.
pricing_source: https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/gpt-5.6-sol, standard pricing through 272K input tokens, checked 2026-07-11
release_timestamp_source: https://openai.com/index/previewing-gpt-5-6-sol/, restricted API and Codex preview began 2026-06-26, checked 2026-07-11

known_cutoff_publicity_caveats: Anthropic reports a January 2026 training-data cutoff but does not disclose an exact date, so the structured exact-date field remains unknown.
Anthropic 4.6-generation and later dateless model IDs are pinned snapshots, not evergreen aliases.
The recorded $2/$10 introductory pricing applies through August 31, 2026; standard $3/$15 pricing starts September 1, 2026.
release_timestamp_source: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-5, Claude API and Claude Platform launch on 2026-06-30, checked 2026-07-11
